subject: Panpour, a small blue-toned monkey Pokémon with a water-tuft on its head, sitting in a misty forest clearing
description: A small monkey Pokémon with a rounded body and a distinctive rounded tuft on its head sits in a tranquil pose on the forest floor. The creature's coloring is pale blue-grey. The background shows tall, slender trees in a hazy, cool-toned woodland scene with soft filtered light coming from above. The mood is serene and slightly misty.
foreground: blue-grey monkey Pokémon seated on ground
background: misty woodland with tall pale tree trunks and soft light
